readings.summary: Stephen is chosen as the first deacon.

readings.citation:
Ps 33:1-2, 4-5, 18-19, R. v.22
Lord, let your mercy be on us, as we place our trust in you.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 33:1-2, 4-5, 18-19, R. v.22
Lord, let your mercy be on us, as we place our trust in you.

readings.summary:
I am the way, the truth and the life, says the Lord;
no one comes to the Father, except through me.
Jesus the way, truth, and life.

antiphons.text:
O sing a new song to the Lord,
for he has worked wonders;
in the sight of the nations
he has shown his deliverance, alleluia.

I am the true vine and you are the branches, 
Says the Lord. Whoever remains in me,
and I in him, bears fruit in plenty, alleluia.
